title: Kaviria vvedenskyi
taxonomy: Kaviria vvedenskyi is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is native to the Himalayan region and is also known as the Himalayan Kaviria. The classification of Kaviria vvedenskyi places it within the genus Kaviria. Further classification within the family Apocynaceae groups it with other plants such as the dogbane and oleander. Kaviria vvedenskyi's classification is based on its physical characteristics and genetic relationships with other species in the plant kingdom.
constituents: Unfortunately, I do not have information on the active constituents of Kaviria vvedenskyi.
parts: I don't have specific information about the medicinal parts of Kaviria vvedenskyi.
